notes: Denver-based American independent. Handcrafted watches inspired by Colorado landscapes. Small series. Visitability unconfirmed.

85RETRO designs watches specifically paired with sneaker culture and streetwear aesthetics. The flagship Model 1 features a minimalist design with quick-release strap system and is built with premium materials for everyday wear.

Addies Dive is an affordable dive watch brand offering models with Seiko movements, sapphire crystals, and quality bracelets in the $79-$300 price range. The brand is sold through multiple retail channels including Alibaba and eBay.
Canadian microbrand run by Bryan Farquharson. Produces handmade, automotive-inspired watches and also hand-makes leather straps with tire tread design.
American watch brand offering fashion and dress watches at accessible price points. Produces quartz and automatic models.

U.S.-based automatic dive watch company founded in 2018 by a veteran of the watch industry with 13 years of experience. Specializes in affordable, top-rated dive watches with various color options and water resistance ratings up to 300m.
Aquatico specializes in tritium-illuminated watches, bronze dive watches, and aviation watches. The brand offers products under $1000 with automatic movements and T100 tritium tubes.
Archer Watches is an American microbrand known for tool watches and dive watches with a focus on quality construction and affordable pricing.

ARDIO is an independent U.S. brand based in Pennsylvania, founded by Ron Oley. The Caribe is the brand's first watch, a limited-edition timepiece (300 pieces) featuring premium materials and boutique production. Every timepiece is hand-inspected, tested, and regulated in the USA.
No homepage content provided for data extraction. Unable to verify current status or details for ARETHUSA Watch Company.
Arken Watch Co is an American independent watchmaker producing field watches and tool watches with a focus on durability and readability.
Armida is an American microbrand specializing in dive watches and sports watches known for excellent value and attention to detail.
Artefkt Watches is an American microbrand focused on vintage-inspired designs and field watches with modern manufacturing standards.
Astor+Banks is an American independent watch brand known for modern dress watches and field watches with clean, minimalist aesthetics.
Atticus Watch Company is an American microbrand producing vintage-inspired field watches and dress watches with accessible pricing.
Audaz is an American microbrand known for bold sports watches and dive watches inspired by vintage designs.

New York-based American design-led independent brand founded by Bradley Price, drawing deep inspiration from motorsport and mid-century American industrial design. All watches are designed in the USA with Swiss movements, and the brand has a strong collector following and press recognition. Studio visits have been arranged for collectors and press; a luxury group experience would need to be negotiated directly with the brand.

AVeritas is a luxury watch brand specializing in handcrafted mechanical timepieces marketed as generational heirlooms. The collection includes 8 primary watch models ranging from $1,195 to $4,949 USD, with complications such as chronographs, automatic/manual wind movements, and two-layer dials. Country of origin is unknown; copyright indicates 2020.

Veteran-owned American watch company specializing in aviation-inspired military pilot watches built from luxury materials. Watches are designed as professional tools rather than collector's pieces, featuring scratch-resistant glass and genuine leather straps.
Axios Watches is an American microbrand specializing in pilot watches and field watches with vintage-inspired styling.
Canadian microbrand producing military-grade watches in limited quantities (9-14 pieces per color). Known for durability, precision, and exclusivity, with movements manufactured in Japan or Germany.

One of a very small number of American independents pursuing genuinely USA-assembled watchmaking, Bathys Hawaii produces technically serious dive watches from Honolulu. Located in Hawaii — a premier luxury travel destination — a brand atelier visit pairs naturally with high-end island itineraries. The founder has been an active voice in the US independent watchmaking community and the brand's technical ambitions set it apart from purely design-led US micro-brands.
American microbrand specializing in vintage-inspired dive watches with modern movements. Known for affordable tool watches with strong design heritage.
Benjamin James is an American microbrand focusing on dress watches and vintage-inspired mechanical timepieces.
Historic American watch brand with vintage roots, revived as independent brand producing retro-inspired timepieces.
Bern is an American watch brand known for outdoor sports watches with a focus on durability and functionality.
Bernhardt is an American independent watchmaker producing pilot watches and vintage-inspired field watches.
American watch brand known for rugged, field-style watches with luminous dials. Focuses on readability and durability for outdoor use.

Beyond Boring Watch Company offers affordable watches with collections including Chronographs, Sunburst, Classics, and Field models. The brand emphasizes free shipping, 30-day money back guarantee, and 1-year warranty. Country of origin cannot be determined from available homepage and shop content.
BIA produces consumer watches with glow-in-the-dark dials powered by Miyota quartz movements. Models include Rosie and Suffragette, with the latter featuring a small seconds complication.
No reliable information available in training data for Black Eye Watches brand.

Automotive enthusiast watch brand founded in 2013, inspired by supercars and featuring materials like carbon fiber and iconic car colors (Rosso Corsa, Verde Ithaca, McLaren Orange). Primary collections include Divematic, Streetmatic Auto, Streetmatic Chronograph, and Streetmatic Quartz.

Architecture-inspired watch brand featuring collections named after NYC landmarks and museums. Currently selling The Met Collection with six variants at $180 USD each. Brand positioning targets modern city dwellers with geometric and decorative design elements.

Blanchard Watch Co. produces the Gentleman Racer collection, a customizable tool watch with split-second timing technology. The brand originated from a successful Kickstarter campaign and offers interchangeable bezels and straps.
American microbrand founded in 2014. Known for field watches and rugged dive watches with modern design. Offers affordable, quality-focused timepieces.
American microbrand producing vintage-inspired dive watches with Swiss movements. Known for quality construction and affordable pricing.

latestModel: Boum Cachet Rose Stone-Enlaid Dial Rose Gold-tone Ladies Watch BM2303
notes: Boum, meaning 'party' in French, is a fashion watch brand targeting women with playful, trendy designs featuring sparkling glitter dials, animal prints, and chic colors.
American watchmaker founded in 2010. Known for minimalist, Scandinavian-inspired vintage-style watches with accessible pricing.
Breed creates Japanese Quartz movement watches designed for multiple personal styles. The brand combines materials like titanium and carbon fiber in their product offerings.

Philadelphia-based independent American watch brand with a distinctive vintage-inspired aesthetic drawing on mid-century American culture and design. All watches are designed in the USA using Swiss movements. Philadelphia's proximity to Lancaster, Pennsylvania (home of RGM, already in the database) makes a Pennsylvania watchmaking heritage route viable — Brew in Philadelphia, RGM in Lancaster, Hamilton's founding city nearby. Physical atelier visitability should be confirmed directly.
North Dakota-based microbrand known for durable field watches. Current lead times approximately 4 weeks. Models include the Plainsman (Swiss Ronda quartz) and Bullion.

California Watch Co. designs timepieces with attention to dimensional details including concave subdials, raised indices, and domed dials. The brand offers diverse collections including PCH Driver Jump Hour, Venice Beach Digital, and chronograph models. Currently carries 42 products ranging from $79.99 to $149.99.
American microbrand producing vintage-inspired watches with Japanese and Swiss movements, known for heritage-focused design.
Detroit-based independent drawing on Great Lakes industrial heritage. Designed and assembled in Detroit. Verify current production status before planning a visit.

Camp Watches is a microbrand designed in Los Angeles and manufactured in Switzerland. Known for the Fieldtimer field watch featuring 15-layer Berlac enamel dials, hand-wound Sellita movements, and vintage-inspired automotive design. Each watch includes three straps and a leather travel wrap.

Canadian veteran-owned microbrand creating rugged field and tool watches designed for real-world use. Known for durability and craftsmanship, with the Fieldmaster being their featured model combining field watch styling with tool watch functionality.

Brooklyn-designed automatic wristwatches characterized by WWII aviator heritage. Affordable, self-winding mechanical watches offered in four case and dial finishes, backed by a two-year guarantee. Second location opened in Chelsea, New York in June 2018.

Chilean watch brand specializing in wood and copper timepieces inspired by indigenous cultures including Diaguita, Mapuche, and Selknam heritage. Features collections like Ancestral, Ethnic, and Cities with over 20 original designs.

Los Angeles-based American watch brand with an established heritage of producing precision watches for the US military and aviation communities, including official US Air Force Thunderbirds watches. The brand occupies a distinctive niche in American watchmaking as a civilian-military bridge brand with genuine US heritage credentials. Physical visit options at the LA operation should be confirmed; the military and aviation narrative suits groups with those interest profiles.
American watch manufacturer with historical roots in Cincinnati, Ohio. Known for producing quality timepieces in the early-to-mid 20th century.
No data found for watch brand 'Cobra de Calibre'. The provided homepage content is for Vancouver Watch Corp, a different company. Unable to extract requested information.
American microbrand known for high-quality rubber watch straps and modular watch designs with excellent build quality.

Boutique Swiss made watch brand created by the team behind Culet Jewellery. Focuses on high-quality, high-performing timepieces for everyday adventurers, featuring Swiss made self-winding mechanical movements.
American watch brand with heritage roots, producing mechanical and automatic watches at accessible price points.

CUCOL is a leader brand in wooden watches, motivated by continuous innovation and original design. Products include men's wood watches with bamboo construction and cowhide leather straps, marketed as casual watches and groomsmen gifts.
Cuban watchmaker founded in 1882, known for classic dress watches and chronographs. Historical brand with modern independent production.
Luxury watch brand offering elegant timepieces in precious metals with diamond options. Known for multi-timezone models like the Grand Two Time Zone and Big Time World 3-Time Zone.
Canadian military watch supplier and independent brand, known for robust field watches and vintage-inspired designs.
American independent watchmaker specializing in custom dial designs and watch modifications. Known for creative, artistic dial work on automatic watches.
American microbrand creating vintage-inspired field and dive watches with affordable pricing and accessible designs.

Day & Night Watch Co. is a US-based watch brand from Dallas featuring luxury men's and women's watches with stainless steel construction, sapphire crystal, and bold dial designs emphasizing strength and authenticity.
American dive watch brand known for affordable, rugged underwater watches and chronographs.
American independent brand creating limited-edition watches often with automotive or local heritage themes.

Watches assembled in Detroit with focus on local identity and American manufacturing heritage. Swiss movements housed and assembled locally. Part of the broader Detroit manufacturing revival story alongside Shinola.
American independent watch brand founded by dive watch enthusiasts. Known for affordable, well-designed dive watches with quality specifications.
No reliable information available in training data for watch brand 'DR Loke'. Unable to verify existence or details.

Microbrand focused on adventure and outdoor watches with practical complications like lumed date wheels and power reserve indicators. Known for knurled crowns, hard-wearing design, and affordable pricing.

Independent microbrand founded in 2019 and based in Kansas City, USA. Known for classic watches drawing inspiration from photography and nature, with all watches assembled and tested locally. Offers affordable chronographs and dive watches.

Austin-based watch brand founded in 2016 by Steven Lee. Features Swiss automatic movements in GMT, Dress, Dive, and Pilot watch collections. Known for capturing the spirit of place and heritage in timepiece design.
Duxot was a watch brand under Dartmouth Brands in the United States. Limited reliable information available in training data. Brand appears to be inactive or defunct.
Maryland-based American watchmaker that designs and builds watches in-house in Hagerstown. Uses American-made MWW 7081A movements that are assembled and regulated in-house.

EDC Hardwear is a watch brand established in 2007 in Mentor, Ohio by Wiegand Custom Watch, LLC. Known for high quality watches and products professionally engineered for everyday abuse and extreme durability.
American microbrand known for affordable mechanical watches inspired by military and pilot design. Uses Miyota and Seagull movements.

Elliot Havok is a design company focused on minimalistic, functional watches for men and women. The brand emphasizes premium quality at fair prices, merging practicality with minimalist design principles.

Empress Watches is a luxury watch brand for modern women, celebrating the relationship between mothers and daughters. The brand sells through their official website and major retailers including Walmart and Nordstrom.
American microbrand known for innovative tactile watches designed for blind and visually impaired users. Uses Swiss and Japanese movements.
Texas-based independent producing large-format aviation and pilot watches. Swiss movements, American positioning. Visitability unconfirmed.
Escapement Time produces both quartz and mechanical watches. The brand offers models with PT5000 movements and water resistance up to 300m, positioned as great value for money.

Esoteric Watches domain (esotericwatches.com) expired as of 2020 and is currently listed for sale on GoDaddy at $195 USD. No active brand website, product information, or operational presence found. The domain has 170 indexed pages from 2021 Wayback Machine but brand appears defunct.

Famine Studios is a US-based brand based in Antelope, California. The company primarily sells apparel and accessories, with limited watch offerings including the Moneyman Watch. Brand is currently active with an ongoing sweepstakes promotion (September-December 2025).

USA-based microbrand watch company located in Elmhurst, Illinois near Chicago. Known for quality, unique designs, and customer service. Produces retro digital and synthwave-inspired watches with Swiss automatic movements.

Canadian watch brand founded in 2014 by brothers Bob and Ary Shahbakhshi. Creates vintage-style watches inspired by aviation and motor racing aesthetics, available in quartz, automatic, and mechanical movements with premium materials.
A microbrand known for affordable mechanical watches with distinctive designs. They focus on providing quality watches at accessible price points.

Fleux is a vintage-inspired dive watch brand that creates continually evolving designs paying homage to iconic divers from the 1960s and 1970s. All watches feature straps made from recycled ocean plastic material called SEAQUAL.
Independent watch brand based in NYC. Named after the foliot, a foundational mechanism in watch escapements. Designed and assembled in the USA, focused on adventure timepieces.
Forge & Foster was founded in 2017 in London and creates bold, stylish watches designed for everyday wear. The brand offers free worldwide shipping from USA and UK locations.

Formotion is a California-based manufacturer founded in 2000 specializing in precision clocks, thermometers, and chronograph wristwatches. Known for high-performance accessories for motorsport, marine, and automotive applications with marine-grade materials and precision movements.
Independent watch brand designed in Puerto Rico, established in 2017. Inspired by the colors and history of Puerto Rico. Also offers eyewear and accessories.
American watch company known for sport and dress watches. Gevril Group owns multiple brands and produces watches across various price points.
An American microbrand specializing in homage-style watches, particularly known for ocean-inspired designs. They gained attention through crowdfunding and online communities.
Good + Evil is a modern watch design brand. The website features an 'Omen' watch model. Country of origin is unknown based on available content.
American watch brand focusing on affordable mechanical and automatic watches with emphasis on design and value.
Grayton produces automatic watches with reputable movements. Known for urban-inspired automatic designs available in stainless steel with cushion cases.

Greg Stevens Design is a microbrand known for pilot watches and custom leather goods. The brand offers models like the GSD-3A (41mm) and GSD 5B (42mm tool watch) with high-quality finishing and NATO straps.
American independent brand focused on affordable automatic watches with emphasis on Scandinavian design sensibilities and quality assembly.

Hager Watches has been operating for more than fifteen years, creating luxury timepieces with emphasis on quality, understated design, and timeless appeal. Known for collections including Commando GMT, Diplomat, Fellow Traveler, and Interceptor models. The Commando GMT features Swiss-made automatic movement with GMT functionality and ceramic bezel.

Insufficient data extracted from provided homepage and collection page content. Only navigation menu structure and country selector dropdown visible; no product listings, pricing, company history, or contact information available in the provided content.

Homepage and shop pages provided contain only navigation menus and currency/region selectors with no product information, pricing, company details, or contact information visible. Insufficient data to extract requested information.

Heitis Watches is a Buffalo-based microbrand founded in late 2016 via Kickstarter, run by founder D.J. Heider. The brand produces dive watches, minimalist watches, aviator watches, and chronographs featuring scratch-resistant sapphire crystals and 316L surgical-grade stainless steel cases.
Canadian microbrand founded around 2014. Known for minimalist, tool-focused watches inspired by military and field watch aesthetics.
American microbrand focused on durable, value-oriented mechanical watches. Known for straightforward dive and field watch designs.
American microbrand founded in 2012 by Marvin Menke based in New York City. Known for military-inspired field watches and vintage-inspired pilot watches with practical luxury design.
American microbrand offering automatic watches with vintage-inspired designs. Known for accessible pricing and diverse watch styles.

HESILI is a Brooklyn-based watch brand founded by a watch enthusiast to create affordable Swiss-made dress watches combining elegance and quality craftsmanship. The watches feature Swiss-made mechanical movements, 316L stainless steel cases, and double domed sapphire crystals with lacquered dials.
Hexa Watch homepage content references streaming movies and TV shows, suggesting the domain may be repurposed or inactive as a watch brand. No verifiable current watch brand information available.

Hislon is a watch brand offering men's watches with features like sapphire glass and water resistance. The brand operates through multiple retail channels including their own jewelry store in Merrick, NY, and online marketplaces.

Sports watch brand specializing in vintage-inspired designs. Current collection includes Racing 40 mechanical chronograph and Diver 40 models. Offers custom straps and ships internationally with free shipping over $80.

Infrared Watches specializes in motorsport-inspired timepieces with bold, distinctive designs. Collections include The Grand Tourer, The Supercharger, The Challenger, and The Street Cruiser, featuring VK63 mecaquartz movements and stainless steel construction. Currently operates globally with GBP pricing and multiple currency support.
Historic American watch brand established in 1892, known for affordable pocket and wristwatches.
American watch brand founded in 1837, known for affordable dive watches and automatic watches with bold designs, typically using Swiss or Japanese movements.

latestModel: Apex Pro - Tactical Smartwatch for Outdoor Dominance
notes: Chinese watch brand producing affordable dive watches and LED electronic watches. Known for homage models mimicking classic designs like the Rolex Air King and Explorer.

Islander is the house brand of Long Island Watch, founded in 2019. The microbrand offers well-priced watches across multiple genres including dive, pilot, field, dress, and everyday watches. Created by the team at Long Island Watch, one of the USA's leading watch retailers.

Independent watch company based in New Jersey offering limited edition watches, cuff links, and watch straps. Known for dress watches and chronographs at affordable prices. Customer rating of 4.9 out of 5 stars.
Jean Vernier is a Swiss watch brand with Brazilian soul based in Rio de Janeiro. The brand uses Swiss movements and manufactures watch cases of good quality.
JF Exciton is a microbrand watch designed by James (a subscriber of I Like Watches). The Exciton II features a 38mm automatic dive watch with Miyota 9015 movement and was funded via Kickstarter.

Joshua & Sons is known for brilliant colors, exquisite design, and craftsmanship. The brand offers Swiss Quartz and automatic movement models in their wristwatches. Available through multiple retailers including their official website and secondary markets.

K.Joseph Watches was founded by a designer inspired by his daughter, grandfather, and Mickey. The brand offers made-to-order customizable watches with quality design and provides a 2-year warranty on all products.
Kingsbury Watch Co. is an independent watchmaker that creates timepieces inspired by both modern and vintage classics, positioned as a premium brand without the luxury markup.
Rugged tool watches designed in Pittsburgh. Known for supplying watches to US military and expeditions. Boutique operation founded by Michael Kobold; visits by arrangement.

Canadian microbrand based in Montreal. Specializes in automatic GMT watches designed for global travelers. Watches are hand-assembled and tested in Montreal with Miyota 9075 Japanese movements and 24-month warranty.
California-based watch brand assembling mechanical watches in the USA. Known for the Balboa model featuring VK63 Mechaquartz movement. Offers both leather strap and NATO-style configurations.

Washington, D.C.-based boutique watch brand founded by Akbar in 2017. Focuses on innovative, distinctive designs with attention to detail and quality workmanship. Known for feature-packed worldtimer and retro chronograph models.
American microbrand known for affordable field watches and dive watches with vintage-inspired designs using Miyota movements.

LIV is a Swiss microbrand that manufactures hand-built timepieces in La Chaux de Fonds, Switzerland. They specialize in unique limited edition Swiss watches using Sellita and ETA movements combined with premium materials, positioning themselves as offering better value than traditional Swiss watchmakers.

Canadian microbrand founded in 2020 and based in Hamilton, Ontario. Known for ruggedly-elegant automatic watches with names derived from streets around the world, combining classic design with modern touches.
American microbrand founded 2013, creating vintage-inspired dress and dive watches with Miyota movements at accessible price points.

Dayton, Ohio-based American watch brand known for high-visibility luminous dial technology and robust military-inspired tool watches, with genuine US design and assembly operations. Dayton's identity as the birthplace of the Wright Brothers and home of the National Museum of the United States Air Force (the world's largest military aviation museum, free entry) creates a compelling aviation heritage travel narrative for groups combining watchmaking with the museum. Visits by arrangement.

Custom watch manufacturer specializing in one-of-a-kind watches using reclaimed live edge wood, resin, and exotic materials. Based in Canada with 10+ years of experience creating commissioned timepieces for special occasions and memorials.

Makoto Watch Company creates limited-run timepieces with distinctive design at accessible prices. The brand is known for dive watches and the Kodawari series featuring precious stone, meteorite, and mother of pearl dials with unique patterns. Founded by Ryan LeClair.
American microbrand producing tool watches and dive watches with military heritage influences. Known for collaboration watches and durable field watch designs.
American watch manufacturer producing military and professional-grade watches. Known for durability and reliability, serving military and government agencies since 1983.
Mark Time Watches is a watch brand with a current collection of six models (M1 through M6). Pricing is displayed in GBP with tax included. Multiple models are currently out of stock.
Watches designed and assembled in NYC. Swiss movements cased and QC'd in their New York studio. Design-forward American brand with genuine local assembly.

Independent watch brand established in 2009 in Los Angeles. Designs and manufactures high quality collectible watches in limited quantity with seasonal releases only. Known for contemporary fashion without compromising traditional craftsmanship.
Watch brand offering chronographs and GMT models with interchangeable straps. Currently running 35% off inventory reduction sale. Sells watches and accessories with multi-currency support.
Canadian microbrand known for affordable automatic watches with minimalist designs and colorful dials.
American watch brand assembled, tuned, and tested in the USA. Produces high quality quartz and automatic movement watches including dive watches, chronographs, and sport watches.
American microbrand producing military-inspired watches with field watch aesthetics and robust construction.
American microbrand producing military-inspired watches with field watch aesthetics and robust construction.
Canadian microbrand specializing in dive watches, chronographs, and sports-oriented timepieces.
American microbrand producing in-house designed dive and dress watches with attention to finishing and movement quality.

Custom American luxury watches handmade and built to order in Livingston, Montana. Produces field watches, aviator watches, and pocket watches with historical model variations including 1915 and 1925-era designs.
Builder of rugged automatic timepieces based on classic designs from the 1950s and 1960s. Known for bold designs and limited releases. Operates primarily through social media to keep costs down.
Montres Carlo offers a collection of men's and women's watches designed for elegance and daily wear. The brand features metal band, leather band, and silicon band watches at accessible price points.

Montrichard Group is a holding/incubator organization that acquires, partners with, or launches watch brands. The group uses AI and technology to transform watch brands into efficient operations. No specific watch models or pricing information available on homepage.
American microbrand known for affordable sport and casual watches with bold colorways and modern designs.

Mr Eatwell is a hand-built watch brand offering custom watches and straps. The brand provides a 2-year warranty and emphasizes free shipping and returns globally. No specific founding date, location, or pricing information is available from the provided homepage content.

MTK Watches is a microbrand with a functional e-commerce website. Copyright date of 2021 indicates recent operation. Insufficient product, pricing, and location data available from provided homepage and shop content.
Mulco is a fashion watch brand known for colorful and contemporary designs. The company focuses on affordable watches with trendy aesthetics.
Nautis is a dive watch brand offering affordable timepieces with a focus on water resistance and durability. The brand emphasizes functional design for recreational diving.

Nektom Watches displays a 'Coming Soon' page with no accessible product information, pricing, or location details. The site is powered by Shopify but appears to be in pre-launch phase with no confirmed activity history available.

NFW is an active watch brand with a military/first responder focus, offering men's and women's collections. The brand emphasizes quality construction and donates to causes including Honor Flight, Chris Kyle Foundation, and Green Beret Foundation. Watches range from $199 to $655 USD with models including Valor, AutoPilot, Regulator, Vector, and Munich collections.
No reliable information available in training data for a watch brand named 'Niall'. Cannot verify existence, origin, or specifications.
Canadian-made microbrand specializing in hand-assembled automatic tool watches. Known for rugged, military-grade designs inspired by owls, targeting divers, pilots, and watch enthusiasts.

San Francisco-based independent American watch brand producing tool watches — particularly dive watches — with Swiss movements and a strong design ethos emphasising utility and quality at accessible price points. The brand has built a respected following in the US watch community through consistent quality and transparency. Physical studio presence in the Bay Area should be confirmed before arranging group visits, as many US micro-brands operate without formal visitor facilities.

Microbrand founded in 2021 by Shaheen and Noraida, based in Orlando. Known for sapphire crystal watches with custom radiant faces and automatic Miyota movements. Brand supports non-profit organizations through watch sales.
No reliable information available in training data for 'Notsag Watches'. Brand identity, location, and operational status cannot be verified.
Canadian microbrand founded in 2015. Known for affordable dive watches and field watches with clean design and Japanese movements. Typical price range $300–$600.

latestModel: Torrent Automatic Atari Rainbow Limited Edition
notes: Nubeo is an American watch brand offering affordable timepieces with contemporary design. The brand targets casual watch consumers with accessible pricing.
Designed and assembled in Chicago. Swiss movements. No public tours known; brand interaction possible at watch events. Confirm visitability directly.

Hong Kong-based watch brand specializing in military-inspired diving watches with Asian mechanical and automatic movements. Known for affordable automatic watches with water-resistant stainless steel and PVD-coated cases.
Canadian independent watchmaker known for custom and limited-edition diving watches. Specializes in mechanical movements and bespoke designs.

Ocean7 was created to provide watch enthusiasts with unique and functional pieces. The brand focuses on quality watches and operates through ocean7watchco.com. The LM-7 model is lightweight titanium construction priced at $799.
A microbrand known for affordable dive watches with in-house design and quality specifications. They focus on producing tool watches with good value propositions.

American watch brand established in New York in 2017. Specializes in dive watches with names inspired by marine life (Searaven, Manta Ray, Barracuda, Thresher, Mako). Offers models with Miyota movements and water resistance up to 200M, currently running sales with multiple models sold out.
Oceanum Series is a dive watch collection by Aquacy featuring 200M water resistance automatic movements. The HEI Matau model is available with black or silver dials and stainless steel mesh bracelet.
A microbrand specializing in vintage-inspired dive watches and sports watches. Known for robust construction and competitive pricing.

American watchmaker based in Tennessee specializing in vintage-inspired mechanical timepieces hand-assembled locally. Known for Railway Edition and Vintage Field watch collections with classic styling at accessible price points.
American watch brand founded in 2013. Known for watches made with reclaimed wood bezels and straps. Uses Japanese quartz and automatic movements; mid-range pricing.
A microbrand producing field watches and sports watches with American military design influences.
Insufficient training data available for P.H. Watches. Brand identity and details cannot be reliably confirmed.

US-based microbrand assembling adventure-ready field watches. Cascadia Field Watch features 316L stainless steel case, sapphire crystal, Ameriquartz movement with 5-year warranty, and 100m water resistance. Emphasizes slow goods philosophy with American assembly and quick-release strap system.

Padron Watch Company is a Minneapolis-based independent watchmaker founded by Leo Padron. The brand designs and assembles affordable, innovative luxury timepieces and offers restoration and repair services.
American watch brand known for brutalist design philosophy. Features models including Cenote and Anillo GMT. Described by Fratello as having a unique approach to watchmaking.
Pono Brand manufactures ukuleles. A Reddit user posted a review of the brand in December 2021.
No reliable information available in training data for watch brand 'Pontvs'. Unable to verify existence, location, or specifications.
American microbrand founded by former military personnel, specializing in military-grade mechanical watches with utilitarian design.

Microbrand specializing in modern military-style field watches. The Onward Future Field Watch collection features futuristic, resilient design available in Explorer and Tactical variants with multiple color options. Won Microbrand Watch of the Year 2024 from The Time Bum.

Projects Watches creates architect-designed, artistic timepieces characterized by bold design choices and minimalist to experimental styles. The brand positions itself as making wearable works of art for creators, with a 30-year history and a collection of 92+ products.

Premium tritium illuminated sport and tactical watch brand, official watch of the United States Marine Corps. Pioneer in bringing tritium lume to the consumer market segment with self-powered illumination lasting 25 years.

Canadian watch brand founded in 2020 specializing in titanium adventure watches inspired by aerospace engineering. Known for durable field watches, dive watches, and pilot watches featuring UltraHEX™ titanium construction. Based in North Vancouver, British Columbia.

Canadian adventure watch brand founded in 2020. Specializes in titanium sports watches and gear designed for extreme conditions, featuring their proprietary UltraHEX™ titanium. Based in North Vancouver with a focus on durability and function-forward design.
American-designed watches assembled in the USA. Small independent operation. Verify current operational status and visitability before planning.

Raven Watches LLC was founded in 2008 and specializes in automatic dive and field watches built for durability and adventure. Known for tough, tool-watch designs with vintage styling cues that balance classic aesthetics with functional, no-fuss instrumentation.
Reactor produces performance sport watches with a service center in California. Known for high-quality construction and excellent customer service.

Rebel Time is a design house for timepieces founded in Brooklyn, NY. The brand focuses on aviation and dive watches with rebellious style and quality construction. Current collection includes the Classic Rebel Chrono and Rebel Aviator models, with the Aquafin dive watch as a recent addition.

Redux & Co. builds pilot-diver hybrid watches inspired by WW2 mission-critical instruments, using premium materials like titanium. The brand fuses iconic design with robust functionality for adventurers and people with missions to tackle.
Canadian watch brand assembled in Montreal, known for rugged and affordable designs inspired by vintage and military watches. Offers automatic, quartz, and solar-powered movements.
Reign produces automatic timepieces with classic designs emphasizing artistry and attention to detail. The brand positions itself as a luxury watch maker for discerning customers.

Relic is a fashion watch brand owned by Fossil Group that offers trendy, accessible timepiece designs for men and women, including skeleton dial watches and various case shapes at affordable price points.
No reliable information available in training data for watch brand 'Relio'. Unable to verify existence or provide accurate details.
Renato Watches are described as excellent built watches with high quality materials, fit and finish. Models include the Diplomat and Eve designs, with the Titanium Beast available on rubber strap.

Navy SEAL and Navy Frogman owned American watch company based in Coronado, California. Designs, assembles, and tests all timepieces in-house. Creates high-performance watches with Swiss movements and sapphire crystals.

Unable to extract data. The provided homepage and shop pages contain only navigation menus and country/currency selectors with no product listings, pricing, brand information, or company details visible. The site appears to be Revolution Media Pte Ltd (Singapore-based media company), not a watch brand called 'Revolution Watch Company.'
American microbrand based in Lancaster, Pennsylvania, known for producing watches with in-house movements and traditional watchmaking techniques. Produces chronographs and dress watches.

Ridge produces high-quality timepieces including field watches, titanium watches, and automatic watches. Known for diver's watches with reliable movements and emphasis on durability and everyday style rather than disposable culture.
No watch brand data found. The provided content is from River Watch of Colorado, a water quality monitoring nonprofit organization, not a watch manufacturer.

Roebuck Watch Company is a US-based watchmaker located in Round Rock with a mission to craft quality watches that stand out. The brand's design philosophy centers on four elements: shape, color, texture, and quality, with notable models including the Diviso and Ranger.
Rössling & Co is a watch brand with limited publicly available information in training data. Insufficient verified details available to confirm current status, pricing, or product specifications.

Rpaige watches are conceived, designed and produced by Rpaige Watch Co. Founded by Richard Paige, a 4th generation watchmaker who established high-profile watch stores in California. Known for unique vintage-inspired designs featuring antique dials and Art Deco styling.

S&B Watches (Smith & Bradley) is a USA-based tactical and sports watch company founded by Jerome Smith and designs/builds watches in Florida. The brand produces high-quality tactical, sport, and luxury watches engineered for performance and rugged style.

Luxury watch brand founded by Kun-Chi Wu in 2011, known for patented concave crystal construction offering wider visibility and scratch resistance. Wine-inspired design philosophy emphasizing elegant, comfortable timepieces.
Salt is a French watch brand designing polyvalent and timeless unisex watches positioned between city and sea aesthetics. They offer waterproof timepieces and provide free worldwide shipping.

US watch manufacturing company based in Springfield, Illinois, founded by two international business travelers. Specializes in American History themed watches including American Railroad Watches and dress watches inspired by meaningful American stories.

Swiss Watch and Fine Jewelry retailer originally founded in Philadelphia in 1851 on Historic Jeweler's Row. Specializes in pre-owned luxury watches including Rolex, Breitling, Omega, and Tag Heuer, with services including repairs, battery replacement, and bracelet adjustments. Relocated to Radnor/King of Prussia area in 2024.

Puerto Rican indie watch brand founded by José Salas and Anita. Known for well-made diver-style watches including the Tiburon (Shark) and Picúa (Barracuda) models priced around $950-$1,000. The founders organize watch meet-ups and collaborate with brands like Nivada Grenchen.

Scuderia encompasses multiple watch brands including CT Scuderia and Scuderia Ferrari. CT Scuderia features retro-modern design inspired by café racer instruments with Italian design, created through Enrico Margaritelli's experimentation with unusual shapes and materials.

U.S. micro-brand founded in 2016, based in Duxbury, Massachusetts. Specializes in nautical and ocean-inspired watches with a mission to support coastal communities, donating 5% to coastal community organizations.

Austin-based watch brand founded by former YETI executives. Swiss Made automatic watches with over-specced adventure-focused design. Global production across four countries spanning three continents, with manufacturing in Switzerland.
American microbrand based in El Dorado Hills, California. Specializes in 3-hand automatic sport and dive watches, including GMT and field watch models.

latestModel: Scuba Dragon Diver Limited Edition 1000 Meters
notes: Seapro is a Los Angeles-based watch brand designed for active lifestyles, particularly water sports including surfing, scuba diving, and spear fishing. Their watches are water-resistant and positioned in the affordable price range.

Canadian microbrand that designs and hand-assembles mechanical tool watches in Barrie, Ontario. Specializes in the MEDIC Pulsometer/Asthmometer watch line designed for first responders and survival in demanding conditions.
Microbrand established in 2025 creating one-of-a-kind salvaged timepieces. Currently running a Kickstarter campaign for their 'Lost at Sea' collection. Country of origin unknown.

Sinclair Watch Co. is a Los Angeles-based custom watch workshop creating bespoke and limited edition watches that are individually hand-built. The brand features watches with square stainless steel cases and sub-dials, available through various retailers including Kartel Watches and Sinclair Timepieces in Denver.
SISU produces big, bold, industrial watches designed in California and made in Switzerland. The brand offers both quartz and automatic Swiss movements, relaunching in 2022.
Smith Bradley produces automatic watches with Swiss ETA movements. The Atlantis model features a 44mm stainless steel case with a 2824-2 Elaboré Swiss automatic movement.

Independent watch brand focused on luxury chronographs and integrated sport watches. Known for signature lines and collections themed around light, rhythm, and movement. Recently launched the Revival Collection.
Women-focused watch brand known for minimalist designs and affordable pricing.

latestModel: Speidel x Life Is Good Watches
notes: Established watch band and bracelet manufacturer known for metal watch straps.
American microbrand founded in 2014. Produces vintage-inspired dive and pilot watches with Japanese and Swiss movements at accessible price points.
Often described as the first watch brand born and built in Brazil. Collaborates with Swiss-Brazilian expert Angelique Chappuis in Neuchatel for development.
American direct-to-consumer brand offering affordable mechanical and quartz watches with vintage styling and value pricing.

Independent New York-based watch brand founded by two seasoned veterans with over 40 years combined experience in the watch industry. Watches are designed in New York and manufactured in Switzerland, featuring modern classic timepieces with distinctive textured dials and bold color palettes.

Stoic Watches is a brand founded by Peter Speake-Marin and others from London, Paris, and Hong Kong, inspired by Stoic philosophy. The watches are offered at entry-level prices with timeless design and robust construction, not made in Switzerland without in-house movements.
Unknown brand — manual review needed

Straton Watch Co. was founded in 2015 by designer Kyle Schut, combining passion for classic cars, racing, and watches. The brand is known for automotive-inspired lifestyle products and has successfully funded Kickstarter campaigns for the Vintage Driver Chrono and Curve Chrono watches.
American watch brand focusing on affordable, accessible timepieces for everyday wear.

Canadian watch brand designed with love in Canada. Features Swiss Sellita SW220 automatic movements in their flagship model 'The Original'. Known for exquisite design with 44mm cases and quick-release band mechanism.

Independent watchmaker founded in 2007 by Chelsea Abingdon Welch. Specializes in purpose-built tool watches including aviation, dive, motoring and tactical models designed specifically for women. Known for functional, attractive timepieces for active women.
A microbrand known for affordable, minimalist watch designs with a focus on simplicity and quality construction.

German watchmaker TNT known for modular watch designs with interchangeable bezels and components. Pierre DeRoche offers TNT collection with DD automatic movements. Also produces chronographs like the Challenger series.

Denver, Colorado-based independent watch brand producing Swiss-movement watches designed in the USA with a strong WWII American aviation heritage narrative, most notably through the Air Defender collection. Denver's outdoor luxury travel appeal and proximity to Vortic Watch Company in Fort Collins (already in the database) allows combined Colorado watchmaking itineraries. Visitability of the Denver studio should be confirmed directly.
Todd & Marlon is not a recognized watch brand in available training data. No reliable information available to confirm existence, location, or current status.

Torino Carrero is a US-based watch brand based in Encino, California. The brand offers diverse collections including automatic, quartz, chronograph, and multi-function watches for men and women, with models like Catania, Milazo, Avatar, and Gem Master series. Known for sport and diving watches with prices ranging from approximately $1,900 to $3,200.
No data found. The provided content is from the U.S. National Weather Service Storm Prediction Center, not a watch brand called 'Tormenta'.
American military watch brand with historical roots, known for tool watches and field watches with vintage aesthetic.
American microbrand known for custom-made watches and vintage-inspired designs.

Trafford Watch Co. produces contemporary watches across multiple collections including Daytripper and Touring GMT series. Known for colorway-driven designs inspired by travel and music themes. Offers matching straps and bracelets as accessories.
American independent microbrand known for tool watches and dive watches with modern design and in-house customization options.
No reliable information available in training data for Trestle Watch Co.
American brand specializing in aviation and instrument-inspired watches with professional aesthetic.
A Canadian microbrand producing dive and field watches with a focus on Canadian heritage and design.

American watch company based in Baltimore, Maryland, specializing in high quality timepieces with designs inspired by Baltimore and its history. Watches are established, designed, and assembled in Maryland.

Modern evolution of WWII-era Dirty Dozen military field watches. Swiss-made timepieces with stainless steel and bronze case options. Features military heritage design with black, white, and green dial variants.

Typsim produces mechanical watches with models ranging from dive watches (200M series) to field watches (Guide, Architect) and specialty timepieces. Features American-made dual-time mechanisms and has pursued chronometer certification.
An American independent watch brand known for minimalist designs and Miyota quartz movements.
American microbrand founded in 2016. Known for heritage-inspired dive and field watches with accessible pricing, using Miyota and Sellita movements.
Canadian microbrand founded in 2020 based in Vancouver, BC. Known for original designs emphasizing value, featuring models like the Adroit automatic GMT watch and the AO everyday watch.
Canadian microbrand creating affordable watches with focus on accessible pricing and design-forward aesthetic.
Ohio-based Swiss Made watch brand launching their first model, the Seek, a 300m diver watch on Kickstarter. Limited to 250 pieces per model in black or white variants.

latestModel: VERO X Realtree Tide Tracker Midnight Edition
notes: Italian micro-brand with heritage dating to 1956, closed in the 1990s and relaunched with new series. Known for dive watches inspired by diving tradition and retro design with modern performance.

latestModel: VERO X Realtree Tide Tracker Midnight Edition
notes: American microbrand focused on affordable, minimalist watches with Japanese quartz movements.
American fashion-forward microbrand offering affordable lifestyle watches with minimalist design and quartz movements.

Independent mechanical wristwatch brand based in Greenwood, Indiana. Known for sketch-to-steel development and original design. Features models like the Duneshore with distinctive polished cases and high water resistance ratings.

Repurposes antique American pocket watch movements (Elgin, Waltham, Hamilton, Illinois) into wristwatches with cases made in-house. Genuinely American from movement to case. Small workshop visits by arrangement.

Canadian independent microbrand known for travel-inspired watches combining vintage aesthetics with minimalist functional design. The Wayforth Voyager is a limited edition dual-time chronograph watch.

Founded by trained watchmaker Cameron Weiss. Assembles watches using American-made parts where possible; some models use Swiss ébauches finished and cased in the LA workshop. Credible American micro-brand with genuine watchmaking credentials.
Watch brand claiming Swiss origin but primarily marketed to Chinese consumers. Available on AliExpress, eBay, and Amazon. Criticized as cheap fashion watches with basic quartz movements.

Canadian watch company founded by Steven that designs and builds classic automatic watches. Known for timeless mechanical timepieces with open backs, including the 150M dress watch inspired by Canada's 150th Anniversary of Confederation.

Canadian microbrand founded in 2010 by Scott Wilk. Known for uniquely designed, handcrafted mechanical timepieces made in Canada with domestic and imported parts, featuring laser-cut or etched dials with distinctive design language.

Hong Kong-based independent brand operating under Mercier Time Ltd. Known for vintage Rolex-style homages, particularly Royal Marine and Royal Navy Aged Edition divers. Features Miyota movements and specifications like aluminum bezels and plexiglass crystals.
Chicago-based watch brand crafting minimal design timepieces with luxury materials including vegetable-tanned Horween leather. Known for Swiss movement watches with in-house design and assembly.

US-based microbrand founded by Craig Karger of Wrist Enthusiast LLC. Known for Swiss-made diver watches designed in New York with ETA movements and limited production runs. Currently selling the Diver 38 and Diver One collections.
Family-owned American watch company based in Austin, Texas. Designs and sells luxury timepieces, jewelry, and watch straps. Also operates as an independent pre-owned watch dealer.
American microbrand creating retro-inspired digital and analog watches with affordable pricing. Known for 1980s and 1990s design influences.
Xezo is a U.S.-based luxury watch brand known for limited edition mechanical watches with artistic designs.

Xpeda is a trendy watch brand originating from Rio, Brazil, offering premium quality watches at modest prices. The brand represents joy, youth, and freedom, targeting people who work hard and play harder. They feature Japanese automatic movements and offer free worldwide shipping.

York & Front Watch Co. is a watch brand with an e-commerce presence offering free shipping in North America. The Burrard Series 001 is their featured everyday wristwatch model. No specific country of origin, founding year, or pricing information could be confirmed from the provided homepage content.
American independent brand focused on durable dive watches and sports watches. Known for robust construction and accessible pricing.

Israeli watchmaker specializing in hand-assembled automatic watches with Hebrew character indices and design elements. Known for limited edition collections named after Israeli cities (Tel Aviv, Beer Sheva, Jerusalem, Eilat). Features 316L stainless steel cases, automatic movements, and water resistance to 200 meters.
